chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI Criminal Bail Application No.396 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATUREs OF JUDGEs For hearing of bail application --------------------------------------------- 19.05.2025 Mr. Muhammad Zareen Satti, advocate for applicant Ms. Seema Zaidi, Additional Prosecutor General Sindh ------------------------------------ Learned counsel for applicant after arguing the matter at some length does not press this criminal bail application and seeks direction for early disposal of the case. Learned Additional Prosecutor General Sindh has recorded no objection on such proposal. In view of above, instant criminal bail application is dismissed on merits. However, learned trial Court is directed to proceed with the case and dispose it of expeditiously, preferably within a period of 3 months. J U D G E Gulsher/PS
